visual_attributes.morphology: tuberous orchid with both epiphytic and terrestrial habitats
distinctive_features: white flowers with smooth edged petals
slender tail produced from the inner margin
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: flowers are approximately 3 times as long as sepals

domain_specific_visual.flower_structure: 3-lobed with long claw and slender incurved spur

functional_attributes.primary_function: mythological representation of beauty and femininity

domain_specific_functional.mythological_role: represents divine beauty in Indian mythology

relationships.description: Narilatha symbolizes beauty and femininity in mythology.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: represents divine beauty and femininity in Indian culture
